name: proxmox-mcp
description: Minimal MCP server for Proxmox VE: 38 tools for nodes, QEMU VMs, LXC containers, storage, cluster, and snapshots.
long_description: A deliberately minimal MCP server for managing Proxmox VE clusters. Exposes 38 tools covering nodes, QEMU VMs, LXC containers, storage, cluster operations, and snapshots. Read-only by default; lifecycle operations (start/stop/clone/snapshot) and destructive operations (delete/rollback) are gated behind explicit risk levels. Built with FastMCP and the official Proxmoxer client.

proxmox_host.title: Proxmox Host
proxmox_host.description: IP address or hostname of your Proxmox VE server.

proxmox_user.title: Proxmox User
proxmox_user.description: Proxmox username with realm, e.g. root@pam.

proxmox_token_name.title: API Token Name
proxmox_token_name.description: Proxmox API token ID. Create one in Datacenter > Permissions > API Tokens.

proxmox_token_value.title: API Token Value
proxmox_token_value.description: Secret value of the Proxmox API token. Stored securely; never logged.

proxmox_verify_ssl.title: Verify SSL
proxmox_verify_ssl.description: Set to 'true' to verify TLS certificates. Use 'false' for self-signed homelab certificates.

proxmox_risk_level.title: Risk Level
proxmox_risk_level.description: Tool access tier: 'read' = read-only (default), 'lifecycle' = + start/stop/reboot/clone/create-snapshot, 'all' = + delete/rollback snapshots.

tools.name: list_nodes
tools.description: List all nodes in the cluster with status, CPU, memory, uptime.

tools.name: get_node_status
tools.description: Detailed status of a node: CPU, memory, disk, load, kernel.

tools.name: get_node_networks
tools.description: List network interfaces on a node.

tools.name: get_node_disks
tools.description: List physical disks on a node.

tools.name: get_node_tasks
tools.description: List recent tasks on a node.

tools.name: get_task_status
tools.description: Get status of a specific task by UPID.

tools.name: get_task_log
tools.description: Get log output from a specific task.

tools.name: list_vms
tools.description: List all QEMU VMs, optionally filtered by node.

tools.name: get_vm_status
tools.description: Current VM status: running/stopped, CPU, memory.

tools.name: get_vm_config
tools.description: VM configuration: hardware, boot order, disks, network.

tools.name: list_vm_snapshots
tools.description: List all snapshots of a VM.

tools.name: start_vm
tools.description: Start a VM. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: stop_vm
tools.description: Force-stop a VM. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: shutdown_vm
tools.description: Gracefully shutdown a VM via ACPI. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: reboot_vm
tools.description: Reboot a VM via ACPI. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: suspend_vm
tools.description: Suspend a VM. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: resume_vm
tools.description: Resume a suspended VM. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: clone_vm
tools.description: Clone a VM (full or linked). Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: create_vm_snapshot
tools.description: Create a VM snapshot. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: delete_vm_snapshot
tools.description: Delete a VM snapshot. Requires risk level all.

tools.name: rollback_vm_snapshot
tools.description: Rollback a VM to a snapshot. Requires risk level all.

tools.name: list_containers
tools.description: List all LXC containers, optionally filtered by node.

tools.name: get_container_status
tools.description: Current LXC container status.

tools.name: get_container_config
tools.description: LXC container configuration.

tools.name: list_container_snapshots
tools.description: List all snapshots of an LXC container.

tools.name: start_container
tools.description: Start an LXC container. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: stop_container
tools.description: Force-stop an LXC container. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: shutdown_container
tools.description: Gracefully shutdown an LXC container. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: reboot_container
tools.description: Reboot an LXC container. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: create_container_snapshot
tools.description: Create an LXC snapshot. Requires risk level lifecycle.

tools.name: delete_container_snapshot
tools.description: Delete an LXC snapshot. Requires risk level all.

tools.name: rollback_container_snapshot
tools.description: Rollback an LXC container to a snapshot. Requires risk level all.

tools.name: list_storage
tools.description: List storage pools with usage info.

tools.name: get_storage_content
tools.description: List ISOs, disk images, backups, templates in a storage pool.

tools.name: get_cluster_status
tools.description: Overall cluster status, quorum, node membership.

tools.name: get_cluster_resources
tools.description: List all cluster resources (VMs, containers, storage, nodes).

tools.name: get_cluster_backups
tools.description: List all cluster backup jobs.

tools.name: get_next_vmid
tools.description: Get the next available VM/container ID.
